creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
sailing into the sunken village on the Euphrates River at #halfeti̇ @gogaziantep @goturkiye @gosanliurfa ✨🇹🇷🛥️🌊🕌✨ 

📍Halfeti is famous for its submerged ruins, which were partially flooded when the Birecik Dam was constructed in the 1990s. The village, with its ancient stone houses and narrow streets, has a haunting beauty, as parts of it are now underwater. Enjoy stunning views of the surrounding landscape, including the dramatic cliffs and lush greenery along the riverbanks on the boat ride
